heading: National Shipper Advisory Committee
label: 42502 National Shipper Advisory Committee
notes: Amendments2024—Subsec. (c)(3). substituted “.—Members of the Committee shall be appointed as follows:” for “.—REPRESENTATION.—Members of the Committee shall be appointed as follows: —”.Pub. L. 118–159RepresentationRepresentation
amendments: Amendments2024—Subsec. (c)(3). substituted “.—Members of the Committee shall be appointed as follows:” for “.—REPRESENTATION.—Members of the Committee shall be appointed as follows: —”.Pub. L. 118–159RepresentationRepresentation

children.heading: .—Establishment
children.label: a .—Establishment
children.text: There is established a National Shipper Advisory Committee.

children.heading: .—Function
children.label: b .—Function
children.text: The Committee shall advise the Federal Maritime Commission on policies relating to the competitiveness, reliability, integrity, and fairness of the international ocean freight delivery system.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Committee shall consist of 24 members appointed by the Commission in accordance with this section.

children.heading: .—Expertise
children.label: 2 .—Expertise
children.text: Each member of the Committee shall have particular expertise, knowledge, and experience in matters relating to the function of the Committee.

children.label: A
children.text: Twelve members shall represent entities who import cargo to the United States using ocean common carriers.

children.label: B
children.text: Twelve members shall represent entities who export cargo from the United States using ocean common carriers.
